property.name: fiscalYearStartMonth
property.label: Fiscal Year Start Month (1-12)
property.description: Set to 1 for January, 2 for February, etc.

property.name: defaultViewLevel
property.label: Default View Level
property.description: Which view level to show by default: rep, territory, or company

property.name: fiscalYearStartMonth
property.label: Fiscal Year Start Month (1-12)
property.description: Set to 1 for January, 2 for February, etc.

property.name: defaultViewLevel
property.label: Default View Level
property.description: Which view level to show by default: rep, territory, or company

property.name: fiscalYearStartMonth
property.label: Fiscal Year Start Month (1-12)
property.description: Set to 1 for January, 2 for February, etc.

property.name: showRepSelector
property.label: Show Rep Selector
property.description: Enable the rep picker dropdown for the Rep view level.

property.name: defaultViewLevel
property.label: Default View Level
property.description: Which view level to show by default: rep, territory, or company
